## Context

Describe the organization, team, or environment at a high level.

## Workflow

Describe the recurring work pattern.

## Current Pain

Where do collaboration, handoff, governance, or coordination break today?

## Relevant Layer

- GitHub layer
- DataHub layer
- TransactionHub layer
- Multiple layers

## Why This Matters

Explain why this is a good wedge or validating example.
